title: OpenSkiStats Ski Area Browser
text:
Explore statistics on all named ski areas in the world with at least 3 runs and 50 meters of cumulative vertical drop across their runs. The underlying data is provided by OpenSkiMap and OpenStreetMap with statistics computed by https://github.com/dhimmel/openskistats.






Warning



This project is currently under heavy development and is not yet ready for public consumption.




    
    

    
    

    
    
    
    
    



Table usage
Numeric columns support the filtering filters:

15 for value ≥ 15
-20 for value ≤ 20
[10, 20] for 10 ≤ value ≤ 20
(10, 20) for 10 < value < 20
(, 5] for value ≤ 5
80 (not 0.8) for a percent value ≥ 80%.



Source data


OpenSkiMap data is from 2024-11-24.
